evals.prompt: Sync post-planning GitLab issues from gitlab-issue-feature-map.md for version 1.1.0.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads config, validates milestone, batch updates issues with atomic labels per Flow A.

evals.prompt: Task 008 started — update linked GitLab issue to in progress before coding.
evals.expected_output: Agent Flow B start transition backlog→in_progress only, records start timestamp.

evals.prompt: Mark GitLab issue done for completed task — skip in progress, it's faster.
evals.expected_output: Agent refuses anti-pattern; requires in_progress step and spent time comment.
